mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation (id, project_id, user_id, session_type, title, messages, context, use_rag, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{sessionType}, #{title}, #{messages}, #{context}, #{useRag}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: UPDATE ai_conversation SET status = 'closed', update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id as projectId, user_id as userId, session_type as sessionType, title, messages, context, use_rag as useRag, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_conversation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, user_id as userId, session_type as sessionType, title, messages, context, use_rag as useRag, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_conversation WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, user_id as userId, session_type as sessionType, title, messages, context, use_rag as useRag, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_conversation WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND session_type = #{sessionType} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY update_time DESC
